channel.title: glazeruns TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from glazeruns

item.title: @Eli Wehbe My voice is cooked. Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: @Eli Wehbe My voice is cooked. Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: Still moving forward Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: bonus miles Cocodona 250 #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: Cocodona 250 ✅️ 6th time running without crew or pacers 1500 miles of Cocodona So damn hard. Thanks to all the volunteers Time for a nap
item.description: Cocodona 250 ✅️ 6th time running without crew or pacers 1500 miles of Cocodona So damn hard. Thanks to all the volunteers Time for a nap

item.title: they look great Cocodona 250 #runtok #cocodona250
item.description: they look great Cocodona 250 #runtok #cocodona250

item.title: and lost a lot of weight Cocodona 250 #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: and lost a lot of weight Cocodona 250 #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: and lost a lot of weight Cocodona 250 #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: so inspiring Cocodona 250 #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: I think that might be for them Cocodona 250 #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: I think that might be for them Cocodona 250 #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: warranty might be over but still have some miles to put on these bad boys. Cocodona 250 has more rocks than the moon. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #cocodona250
item.description: warranty might be over but still have some miles to put on these bad boys. Cocodona 250 has more rocks than the moon. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #cocodona250

item.title: i lost 11 pounds. Not weight loss advice. Cocodona 250 miler. My 6th time running this race. I highly recommend it. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: i lost 11 pounds. Not weight loss advice. Cocodona 250 miler. My 6th time running this race. I highly recommend it. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: Start line was a bit different than 6 days ago Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: Start line was a bit different than 6 days ago Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: I went for an active recovery run the morning after Cocodona 250. people were still out grinding. This has become a fun tradition or running these incredible humans in. the human spirit is amazing. smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: I went for an active recovery run the morning after Cocodona 250. people were still out grinding. This has become a fun tradition or running these incredible humans in. the human spirit is amazing. smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: 6 years and 1500 miles so far. Plus you know there were many bonus miles. We just keep coming back for more. Congratulations to my competition for another Cocodona yard completed. @Free Outside Aaron Fleisher @Jose Sosa jr On to year 7. Smile, or you're
item.description: 6 years and 1500 miles so far. Plus you know there were many bonus miles. We just keep coming back for more. Congratulations to my competition for another Cocodona yard completed. @Free Outside Aaron Fleisher @Jose Sosa jr On to year 7. Smile, or you're

item.title: and I lost 11 pounds. Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: and I lost 11 pounds. Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: Hope you enter the lottery for next year. Cocodona 250 #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: Hope you enter the lottery for next year. Cocodona 250 #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: just an easy 50 step process 🤣 Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: just an easy 50 step process 🤣 Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: I love the feeling of being destroyed after a race and having to slowly put myself back together. Cocodona 250 did that to me. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: I love the feeling of being destroyed after a race and having to slowly put myself back together. Cocodona 250 did that to me. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: Ohio run May 23rd-25th New York City run May 30th hope you can join me Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Ohio run May 23rd-25th New York City run May 30th hope you can join me Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Teaming up with Scott Jurek to kick off the @Back on My Feet 10 Day, 10,000 Mile Challenge for Global Running Day. Every mile logged helps raise awareness and support for those overcoming homelessness and addiction. Visit Back on my Feet and check the St
item.description: Teaming up with Scott Jurek to kick off the @Back on My Feet 10 Day, 10,000 Mile Challenge for Global Running Day. Every mile logged helps raise awareness and support for those overcoming homelessness and addiction. Visit Back on my Feet and check the St

item.title: You'll never meet a hater doing more than you Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #cocodona250
item.description: You'll never meet a hater doing more than you Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #cocodona250

item.title: Lost 11 pounds. if you want the longer version of this look down a couple videos. there's a 10 minute verison. Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: Lost 11 pounds. if you want the longer version of this look down a couple videos. there's a 10 minute verison. Cocodona 250 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: thanks @Lauren Glaze And no, I don't own a belt. Cocodona 250 x 6 years. 1500 miles. Every year the course has been a little different. Every year the course changes me. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: thanks @Lauren Glaze And no, I don't own a belt. Cocodona 250 x 6 years. 1500 miles. Every year the course has been a little different. Every year the course changes me. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: lace them up #runtok
item.description: lace them up #runtok

item.title: Definitely a chopped unc Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #circlepit
item.description: Definitely a chopped unc Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #circlepit

item.title: A skateboard pump track and carbon shoes was quite the combo. Definitely hard to find a rhythm and the Arizona heat made it challenging. But the live music in the middle made it incredible. @Satisfy x @adidas circle pit. I ran in the first wave and then
item.description: A skateboard pump track and carbon shoes was quite the combo. Definitely hard to find a rhythm and the Arizona heat made it challenging. But the live music in the middle made it incredible. @Satisfy x @adidas circle pit. I ran in the first wave and then

item.title: Taking the book to Ohio. And running 120 miles while I'm at it. First time in the state. Here's the plan: Friday 5/23, 5:15pm - Cincinnati 3-mile group run + book signing under the suspension bridge Saturday 5/24 68 miles: Cincinnati → Xenia Sunday 5/25 3
item.description: Taking the book to Ohio. And running 120 miles while I'm at it. First time in the state. Here's the plan: Friday 5/23, 5:15pm - Cincinnati 3-mile group run + book signing under the suspension bridge Saturday 5/24 68 miles: Cincinnati → Xenia Sunday 5/25 3

item.title: keep streaking smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: keep streaking smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: First time in the UK. Will you come say hi? Summer Spine should be very hard. I'm scared. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #runtok #summerspine
item.description: First time in the UK. Will you come say hi? Summer Spine should be very hard. I'm scared. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #runtok #summerspine

item.title: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun
item.description: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun
